info.title: Mindbody Public API
info.description: Mindbody Public API v6 for fitness, wellness, and beauty business management. Manage appointments, classes, clients, enrollments, payroll, sales, site configuration, and staff.

get.summary: Get active business hours for studios
Get dates staff are scheduled to work
Get schedule items including appointments and unavailabilities

post.summary: Book an add-on on an existing appointment
Add a client to a class
Remove a client from a class
Remove clients from classes in bulk

get.summary: Get active memberships for a client
Get active memberships for multiple clients

post.summary: Initiate purchase contract with alternative payments
Copy credit card between clients across sites
